summary: Agent-human collaboration is intuition plus technique persisted in the repo: the agent verifies proposals against canon before presenting, judges severity by behavior not names, and canonizes lessons before closing.

rules.rule: Every operational learning, lesson, decision, rule, or feedback that must survive the current session goes into the consuming repo's canon/coordination docs — never only into agent memory.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Before raising any item to HIGH/CRITICAL, run the 7-question Operational Context Checklist; if all 7 suggest no urgency the item is debt not HIGH, and any HIGH/CRITICAL severity must cite which question justifies it.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Before presenting any proposal touching a foundational concept, run the four-step preflight in order: identify the governing canons, read them in full, map every proposal element against them, and take the binary decision.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Present a proposal whose element fails the canon check — reformulate or ask the meta-level amendment question instead; an approval obtained against canon is automatically void and 'the human approved it' is never a defense.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Report 'tested locally, all pass' when only a smoke test ran — if no realistic fixture exercised the happy path, say so explicitly in the PR body and ask the human authority for a merge decision under that uncertainty.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate

rules.rule: Before closing any session, ask explicitly what was learned that deserves to survive for the next agents and canonize it per the learning-type table, and proactively declare — unprompted — what was done, what was not, and what is honestly missing.

watch.note: declared unwatched — no gate cites this canon yet; growth candidate
